entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE LOWER 50S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING EAST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE MID 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT
